content: Just as the English language definition of reflexion encompasses both the optical phenomenon of reflecting light and the cognitive act of reflective thinking, LLM self-reflection mechanisms can be redesigned to integrate this dual core: LLM self-reflection should not only generate revised reasoning (the 'cognitive reflection' end of reflexion) but also mirror how physical light reflection bounces off the environment to cast a clearer image of the problem, by reflecting off external ground-truth feedback to correct blind spots in internal self-assessment.
